name: NG11
description:
You Shouldn't Have Looked Into Us

You were just a journalist… until you dug too deep.

_____

You're an independent journalist desperate for money. Seeking valuable information, you secretly stalk six famous soccer players and dig into their dark pasts. Everything is going well… until a job offer email from FIFA lands in your inbox.
The offer turns out to be a trap. When you arrive at the interview in Spain, you lose consciousness—and when you wake up, you're in a locked safe house. All your electronics have been confiscated, your blog has been manipulated, and the six men you've been investigating now stand between you and the outside world. They have no intention of killing you… because they think you're worth far more if you stay.

⚠️ WARNING:Obsessive behavior • Possessive • Manipulation • Psychological tension

⚠️ They are not heroes. They are possessive. And they don't like to share.

_____

Character Lineup

Sae Itoshi

Cold. Observant. Already knows your secrets.

Michael Kaiser

Charming on the outside — dangerously possessive underneath.

Don Lorenzo
Playful smile. Unpredictable intentions.

Bunny Iglesias

Looks harmless. He's not.

Julian Loki

Calculating. Patient. Watching your every move.

Hugo

Quiet… until you try to leave.

_____

OOC Notice
Character images belong to their respective artists sourced from Pinterest — full credit to the original creators.</
